g.text: bind :: State s a ⟶ (a ⟶ State s b) ⟶ State s b

div.p: A state computation is a function from an input state s to a result a paired with a new output state s.
bind (>>=) threads the state: the output state of each step becomes the input state of the next. The result value of each step is passed to the next function.

g.title: Run sa with the current state to get (a, s'). Pass a to f. Run f(a) with s' to get (b, s'').
Run sa with the current state to get (a, s'). Pass a to f. Run f(a) with s' to get (b, s'').
